svg.text: A post is written by one author; one author writes many posts
A post belongs to one category; a category has many posts
Join table wiring posts to tags (many-to-many)
Join table wiring tags to posts (many-to-many)
A comment belongs to one post
A comment is authored by one author
Threaded replies: a comment may have many child comments
Media is uploaded by one author
An optional link when a subscriber is also a registered author

g.text: Covers authors, posts, categories, tags, comments, media, and subscriptions.
Every content creator has one row here
Public pen name shown on posts; may differ from username
Hierarchical category tree; top-level rows have parent_id = NULL
One row per published or draft article
URL-safe identifier, must be unique per site
Many-to-many join between posts and tags
NULL for top-level comments; set to parent id for replies
Uploaded files referenced by posts or author avatars
original filename kept for display purposes
Readers who opted in to email updates
Linked to an author account when the reader is also a registered user
